# Uganda Administrative Divisions — Full Reference

> Last updated: 2026-05-27. License: CC-BY-4.0.

## Per-Region Data Files

- [Central](https://github.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/central-ug1.txt) — 26 districts, 47 countys, 268 sub-countys
- [Eastern](https://github.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/eastern-ug2.txt) — 37 districts, 54 countys, 454 sub-countys
- [Northern](https://github.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/northern-ug3.txt) — 37 districts, 48 countys, 339 sub-countys
- [Western](https://github.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/western-ug4.txt) — 35 districts, 54 countys, 459 sub-countys

## Summary

| Region | Districts | Countys | Sub-countys | 
|---|---|---|---|
| Central | 26 | 47 | 268 | 
| Eastern | 37 | 54 | 454 | 
| Northern | 37 | 48 | 339 | 
| Western | 35 | 54 | 459 |
